_comment: Real-world TypeScript corpus for the ts_conformance gate.
Each entry: { path: <repo-rel>, lang: ts|tsx, skip?: bool,
skip_reason?: string }. Lang defaults to extension-
based detection if omitted. The verifier records pass/fail in
To grow this corpus: vendor real-world .ts/.tsx/.d.ts files into
bench/real_world_ts/ and add an entry here. Pick representative
fixtures across the TS surface area: type aliases, generics,
conditional / mapped types, decorators, satisfies, etc.
Files we currently include come from bench/node_modules (already
vendored as part of the OXC bench harness setup):

files.skip_reason: 666 KB; parser hangs (>60s) on this file. Tracked for performance investigation; not yet a correctness blocker.
